# llms.txt for Gemini Exchange API Docs

## Website Crawling and Indexing Guidelines for Language Models

# Last Updated: 2026-02-25T22:41:12.825Z

## Site Information:

- site_name: Gemini Exchange API Docs
- site_url: https://docs.gemini.com
- site_description: /websocket/overview/introduction
- REST API: Version 1.0.0
- [OpenAPI REST Version 1.0.0 spec url](https://docs.gemini.com/rest.yaml)
## Changelog:

- [Changelog URL](https://docs.gemini.com/changelog/revision-history)

## Website Structure:

- Get Started: /
- REST: /rest
- Websocket: /websocket/overview/introduction
- FIX: /fix/overview/dictionary/version
- Changelog: /changelog/revision-history

## Important Documentation Content:

- REST version 1.0.0 API Reference: /rest
## Allowed Crawling Paths

- /*
